// 01

About Me

Rising senior in Cybersecurity Engineering at the University of Delaware with strong Python skills and hands-on experience automating workflows using Bash and Docker. I've developed reproducible pipelines and custom tooling for logic locking and attack simulations in NASA-funded research and delivered metrics-driven documentation for lunar resource projects.

I'm familiar with relational and NoSQL databases, unit testing frameworks, and cloud services. Currently seeking a DevOps Software Internship to build tools and APIs for performance metrics on IoT devices.

Experience

Jan 2026 – Present
Systems Engineering & Design Intern
Cislune (Delaware Space Grant) · Remote
  • Supported a scoped engineering project in lunar resource and construction technology by developing Python-based tooling for tracking weekly performance metrics.
  • Contributed to NASA LunaRecycle Challenge Phase 2 by organizing and presenting submission materials.
  • Translated prototype and digital twin details into reviewer-friendly slides and short memos.
  • Created traceable documentation linking measurement points to model inputs, outputs, and verification notes.
  • Collaborated across Git-based workflows and leveraged Docker containers to improve reporting consistency.
May 2025 – Present
Lead Researcher
NASA Research Internship · Newark, DE
  • Engineered original logic locking tools in Python and Go, and built a reproducible SAT/SLE attack pipeline to validate security claims.
  • Discovered new scaling laws for Diversification-Through Layering to improve resilience against attacks.
  • Authored first general SKGLock+ implementation; co-developing Trojan detection methods.
  • Prepared research manuscript for submission to ISCAS25 for academic review on Hardware Security.
Nov 2024 – May 2025
Undergraduate Researcher
Logic Locking Modules Research · Newark, DE
  • Collaborated with Dr. Satwik to integrate Logic Locking Modules with OpenAI frameworks.
  • Developed hardware designs secured against AI-driven intrusions on IoT systems using System Verilog and Python.
May 2023 – Present
Lead Designer
UD IT Website Project · Newark, DE
  • Spearheaded the redesign of the UD Parking Services website to meet ADA and HTML policy standards.
  • Implemented backend database integrations for real-time availability updates.
  • Managed project deadlines and board requirements for website aesthetics and functionality.
